vibe: NASA Mission Control / Open MCT / Cybersecurity SOC Dashboard
design_principles: Information Density > White Space: Every pixel serves a telemetry or operational purpose.
Data is Art: The aesthetics emerge from the strict, grid-based arrangement of real-time data.
Zero Fluff: No decorative gradients, no soft shadows, no playful illustrations.
Signal over Noise: Use high-contrast alert colors (Red/Amber/Green) against a pure void background.

typography.font_strategy: The 'Old Money Tech' variant adapted for Deep Tech. Swiss uniformity for structure, Monospace for truth.
rules: ALL numbers, metrics, coordinates, and timestamps MUST use JetBrains Mono.
Labels and table headers must be uppercase, tiny, with wide letter-spacing.
Never use Inter or generic default fonts.
No full-screen gradients. Color exists only to guide action and indicate system health.
Borders are technical and visible. The grid must be exposed.
Use pure #000000 or #050505 for the deep background to create a 'Space/Monitor' feel.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Tight and dense. p-2, p-3, p-4 max inside widgets.

structure.app_wrapper: h-screen w-full flex flex-col overflow-hidden bg-[#050505]
structure.top_bar: h-12 border-b border-[#232733] flex items-center justify-between px-4 bg-[#111214]
structure.sidebar: w-16 md:w-64 border-r border-[#232733] bg-[#050505] flex-shrink-0
structure.dashboard_grid: flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-3 md:p-4 grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 xl:grid-cols-12 auto-rows-min

layout_and_spacing.surfaces: GRID BORDERS (The 'Technical' Look). Use sharp edges (rounded-none or rounded-sm). Eliminate soft drop shadows. Use 1px solid borders for definition.

components.strategy: Shadcn UI base, heavily customized for dark telemetry.

specific_instructions.cards: border border-[#232733] bg-[#111214] rounded-sm p-4 hover:border-[#3E4557] transition-colors. No shadows.
specific_instructions.buttons: Square edges, crisp 1px borders. Primary button uses critical_red or info_blue with black text.
specific_instructions.tables: Dense. text-xs or text-sm. JetBrains Mono for data cells. 1px bottom border on rows.
specific_instructions.inputs: bg-[#050505] border-[#232733] text-sm focus:border-white focus:ring-0 rounded-sm
specific_instructions.badges: Square (rounded-none). text-[10px] uppercase font-mono px-2 py-0.5. Colors match status.
specific_instructions.alerts: Sonner toast system. Dark mode forced. Red border for critical alerts. Must use 'Tracing Beam' or glowing border for active RED alerts.

frontend_modules.1_top_bar: Must display API health indicator (pulsing dot), Current System Time (UTC/IST in font-mono), and active alert counts.
frontend_modules.2_sidebar_nav: Persistent. Icons + Text. Active state highlighted with a 2px left border (e.g., border-l-2 border-white).
frontend_modules.3_live_risk_cards: Top row of dashboard. Span 3 or 4 cols each. Big typography for counts (RED/YELLOW/GREEN).
frontend_modules.4_live_map: React Leaflet. MUST use CartoDB Dark Matter tile layer to match theme. Markers must be custom colored dots (pulse animation for RED nodes). Highway segments drawn via GeoJSON or Polyline.
frontend_modules.5_route_planner: Compact form in a sidebar or widget. Origin/Destination input. Output highlights the safest route on the map in Safe Green.
frontend_modules.6_node_monitoring_table: Data grid showing Node ID, RSSI, Battery%, Last Updated, Status. Row color tints slightly on hover.
frontend_modules.7_analytics_charts: Recharts. LineCharts or AreaCharts. Raw data feel. strokeWidth={1.5}. Minimal grid lines (strokeDasharray='3 3' stroke='#232733'). Monospaced tooltips.
frontend_modules.8_alert_system: Persistent Alert Panel in the right sidebar or bottom sheet. Toasts for immediate RED alerts (landslide detected).

animations.telemetry: Use a subtle pulsing opacity animation for active/live indicators.
animations.critical: Use the 'Tracing Beam' effect (animated CSS gradient border) for high-severity threat panels to demand attention without breaking the dark theme.

testing.requirements: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case, role-based (e.g., data-testid='node-status-badge').

media.instructions: No standard stock photos. UI is strictly telemetry, maps, and data. If a placeholder is required for a user avatar, use a geometric SVG or initials.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a real-time layout using grid-cols-12 architecture.
Install and use JetBrains Mono, IBM Plex Sans, and Chivo.
For the Leaflet map, use url='https://{s}.basemaps.cartocdn.com/dark_all/{z}/{x}/{y}{r}.png' for the dark theme tile layer.
Do not use generic Shadcn rounded cards. Override radii to 'rounded-sm' or 'rounded-none'.
Override all Shadcn shadows to 'none' or use 1px hard borders.
Implement Recharts with dark mode defaults (axes color #8F95A1, grid #232733).
Ensure the dashboard feels like a physical SOC/Command Center screen—dense, precise, and high-contrast.
